zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh是Thomas Walsh和Katherine的女兒，於1369年出生在英國斯塔福爾艾丁加爾。她於1392年與Thomas de Gresley在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德拉可洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年在英國德比夏爾享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh是Thomas Walsh和Katherine的女儿，于1369年出生在英国斯塔福爾艾丁加爾。她于1392年与Thomas de Gresley在英国英格兰德比夏爾德拉可洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1456年在英国德比夏爾享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walsh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, Dermot, John Patrick, Kieran, Declan, Eamonn, Colm, Donal, Seamus, Siobhan, Brennan.

English and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English walshe (Old English wælisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’. This form of the name was generally more common than Welsh , especially in Ireland, where it originally denoted a Welsh-speaking immigrant, in particular any of the Welshmen who arrived in the wake of Strongbow's Anglo-Norman invasion of 1170. In Ireland it is sometimes also a translation of Breathnach ‘Briton’.
English: in Yorkshire and Lancashire the name is sometimes a shortened form of   Walshaw  .

variants.name: Walshe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eoin, Murph.
English and Irish: variant of   Walsh  .

variants.name: McBratney
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Breatnaigh ‘son of the Briton’ (referring to the Welsh of Strathclyde). Compare Walsh and Galbraith .

variants.name: Welsh
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English welshe (Old English wēalisc, wēlisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’, for someone from Wales or a speaker of the Welsh language. Compare Walsh and Wallace .
Americanized form of Ukrainian and Jewish (from Ukraine) Voloshin or its Polish variant Wołoszyn (see Woloszyn ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh was born in 1369, in Edingale, Staffordshire, England as the daughter of Thomas Walsh and Katherine. She married Thomas de Gresley in 1392, in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1456, in Derbyshire, England, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh est née en 1369, à Edingale, Staffordshire, Angleterre, fille de Thomas Walsh et Katherine. Elle a épousé Thomas de Gresley en 1392, à Drakelow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1456, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh wurde 1369 in Edingale, Staffordshire, England, als Tochter von Thomas Walsh und Katherine geboren. Sie hat 1392 in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Gresley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1456 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh è nata il nel 1369 nel Edingale, Staffordshire, England come figlia di Thomas Walsh e Katherine. Lei sposato Thomas de Gresley nel 1392, nel Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1456, nel Derbyshire, England, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Walshは1369年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエディンガルでThomas WalshとKatherineの娘として生まれた。1392年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウでThomas de Gresleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh(은)는 1369년 영국 스태퍼드실르 에딩일에서 Thomas Walsh(와)과 Katherine의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 드라켈로에서 Thomas de Gresley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 영국 더비실르에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh nasceu em 1369, em Edingale, Staffordshire, Inglaterra filha de Thomas Walsh e Katherine. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Gresley em 1392, em Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1456, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh родилась в 1369 г. в местности эдингеил, стаффордшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Thomas Walsh и Katherine. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Gresley в 1392 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1456 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Walsh nació en 1369, en Edingale, Staffordshire, Inglaterra como hija de Thomas Walsh y Katherine. Se casó con Thomas de Gresley en 1392, en Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1456, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años.
